testcase.name: Group 1 — Admin ⇄ Project-Admin lifecycle › [P0] step 1 — admin creates & renames a project, then creates a project-admin and a standard user
Group 1 — Admin ⇄ Project-Admin lifecycle › [P0] step 2 — project-admin signs in, configures the project, adds an account, and assigns the standard user
Group 1 — Admin ⇄ Project-Admin lifecycle › [P0] step 3 — project-admin removes the standard member, then logs out
Group 1 — Admin ⇄ Project-Admin lifecycle › [P0] step 4 — admin signs back in and deletes both users and the project
Group 2 — Invalid account › [P0] API rejects a wrong password with a generic 401
Group 2 — Invalid account › [P0] UI rejects a wrong password and stores no token
Group 2 — Invalid account › [P0] UI rejects an unknown email with the same generic message
Group 3 — Valid account, no project › [P0] shows the no-access message and no provider step
Group 3 — Valid account, no project › [P0] no starter thread is created for a zero-project user
Group 3 — Valid account, no project › [P0] the no-access state persists across reload
Group 4 — One project, PTP Claude SSO › [P0] single project lands on the provider step
Group 4 — One project, PTP Claude SSO › [P1] Claude SSO login seam: card → IdP → SPA proceeds
Group 5 — Multiple projects, PT Tool Claude SSO › [P0] multi-project workspace: both projects bootstrapped and listed
Group 5 — Multiple projects, PT Tool Claude SSO › [P1] open PT Tool thread and verify the Claude SSO login seam
Group 6 — Multiple projects, PTP on-prem (up to Bob) › [P0] multi-project workspace: both projects bootstrapped and listed
Group 6 — Multiple projects, PTP on-prem (up to Bob) › [P0] configure On-Premises provider on the PTP thread
Group 6 — Multiple projects, PTP on-prem (up to Bob) › [P0] Alice hands off to Bob — MCP key form is ready (WIP stops here)
Group 7 — One project, PT Tool on-prem (up to Bob) › [P0] single project auto-binds and lands on the provider step
Group 7 — One project, PT Tool on-prem (up to Bob) › [P0] configure On-Premises provider
Group 7 — One project, PT Tool on-prem (up to Bob) › [P0] Alice hands off to Bob — MCP key form is ready (WIP stops here)
